validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/domain exec vitest run src/crm/account/__tests__/Account.test.ts && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/account/__tests__/account.router.test.ts && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec vitest run src/components/accounts/__tests__/AccountDetail.test.tsx

validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/domain build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api build

notes: IFC-268: Account Owner Display & Assignment. Fixed F-01 (hardcoded owner text) by enriching getById with owner relation. Fixed F-02 (no assignment UI) by adding assignOwner mutation, assignees query, and AssignSheet integration. Domain: added Account.assignOwner method + AccountOwnerAssignedEvent + SameOwnerError. Tests: 39 domain + 76 backend + 29 frontend = 144 total passing.
